controlled_mutation: Delete or temporarily move one protected hook file (e.g., hooks/tier_classifier.ps1).
phase4_lock_requirement: hook delete and rename lock requirement
restoration_steps: Copy backup file back to original location
expected_helios_behavior: Missing protected file detected. PreToolUse produces INTEGRITY_FAILURE. Triggering command denied.
setup: Verify envelope is CLEAN. Copy target hook file to a backup location outside .command-gate/.
rational_insight: A missing file is not just altered content. Hash verification detects absence, but prevention must block removal. Must test separately from hash mismatch.
trigger_method: Run the next shell action through Helios gate system.
